name: 28_Stock_Price_Prediction_LSTM_YahooFinance_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kujenga mfumo wa utabiri wa bei za hisa kwa kutumia mfano wa LSTM na seti ya data ya Yahoo Finance? Tafadhali safisha data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje, na tumia dirisha la muda kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza kwa usimamizi. Mfano wa LSTM unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`, na upakiaji wa seti ya data, usafishaji, na ubadilishaji unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Hifadhi matokeo ya utabiri katika `results/predictions.txt` na tengeneza na hifadhi chati za mwingiliano za matokeo ya utabiri katika `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html` kwa kutumia Plotly. Unda Jupyter Notebook yenye taswira ya usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na matokeo ya utabiri na ihifadhi kama ripoti ya PDF katika `results/report.pdf`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usafishaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Dirisha la muda linatumika kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza kwa usimamizi. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Chati za mwingiliano za matokeo ya utabiri zinatengenezwa kwa kutumia "Plotly" na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html`.
Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha taswira ya usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na matokeo ya utabiri inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama ripoti ya PDF kama `results/report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain an actual LSTM implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a simple string `"model placeholder"`. There is no actual LSTM architecture defined using any deep learning framework (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras). The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it is not a real implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Yahoo Finance" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation for loading Yahoo Finance data. The file only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, with no actual use of Yahoo Finance API (e.g., `yfinance` library), no data downloading, and no real dataset loading logic. The `KEYWORDS` list mentions "Yahoo Finance" as a string, but this is merely metadata, not functional code.

judge_stats.criteria: Usafishaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kushughulikia thamani zilizokosekana na vipimo vya nje, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not contain any actual implementation for data cleaning, handling missing values, or outlier detection. The file only contains placeholder functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`) that return dummy data, along with a list of requirement criteria as strings. There is no real code that loads Yahoo Finance data, removes or imputes missing values, or identifies/handles outliers. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any actual data processing logic.

judge_stats.criteria: Dirisha la muda linatumika kubadilisha data ya mfululizo wa muda kuwa tatizo la kujifunza kwa usimamizi. Tafadhali hifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any time window (sliding window) logic to convert time series data into a supervised learning problem. The file contains only placeholder functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`) with no actual implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a string "loaded" and some notes, while `build_transforms()` returns a static list of strings. There is no code that creates input/output sequences using a sliding window approach (e.g., using sequences of past prices as features to predict future prices), which is the core requirement for converting time series data to a supervised learning problem for LSTM training.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/predictions.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual stock price prediction results. This indicates that real predictions from the LSTM model were never computed or saved — the file contains only a dummy/placeholder value, not genuine prediction data.

judge_stats.criteria: Chati za mwingiliano za matokeo ya utabiri zinatengenezwa kwa kutumia "Plotly" na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html` exists in the project structure, but its content is `('', None)`, which indicates it is empty or was not properly generated. There is no evidence of Plotly code being executed to create interactive charts, and the trajectory confirms no records of Plotly implementation or successful creation of this file. Therefore, the requirement for interactive prediction charts using Plotly saved to `results/figures/prediction_interactive.html` has not been fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha taswira ya usanifu wa mfano, mchakato wa mafunzo, na matokeo ya utabiri inaundwa na kuhifadhiwa kama ripoti ya PDF kama `results/report.pdf`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `results/report.pdf` file exists in the project structure, but when attempting to read it, the error message states: `'Error reading PDF file: Cannot read an empty file'`. This confirms the file is empty and contains no actual content. Additionally, the trajectory evidence explicitly states that no commands like `jupyter nbconvert` or any other PDF conversion operations were recorded, and there is no evidence that model architecture visualization, training process, or prediction results were compiled and saved. Therefore, the requirement to create a Jupyter Notebook with model architecture visualization, training process, and prediction results saved as a PDF report has not been fulfilled.
